name: Coffee Nog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sugar and egg yolk. Beat well until smooth.
2. Heat the cream in a small saucepan over medium heat until just simmering.
3. Slowly whisk the egg/sugar mixture into the hot cream, stirring constantly to avoid boiling.
4. Remove from heat and stir gently.
5. Pour the coffee into your favorite cups.
6. Top each cup with the cream mixture.
7. Sprinkle with nutmeg before serving.
Enjoy your Coffee Nog!
